case_title: OSBORNE, ROBERT JAMES DBA OSBORNE APPRAISAL SERVIC VS ALEX, JAMES JOHN AKA ALEX,JIM DBA BAYCAL FINANCIAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, ROBERT JAMES DBA OSBORNE APPRAISAL SERVIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEX, JAMES JOHN AKA ALEX,JIM DBA BAYCAL FINANCIAL $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $417.00, THIS JUDGEMENT IS RENDERED FOR THE PURPOSE OF ISSUING OEX IN S.F. SUPERIOR COURT SMALL CLAIMS. JUDGEMENT WAS ISSUED IN SAN DIEGO SUPERIOR COURT - CENTRAL DIVISION ON CASE NO. SC154926, ON 9/28/04. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY OSBORNE, ROBERT JAMES DBA OSBORNE APPRAISAL SERVIC AS TO DEFENDANT ALEX, JAMES JOHN AKA ALEX,JIM DBA BAYCAL FINANCIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THIS CLAIM IS SET UP FOR A JUDGEMENT RENDERED IN SAN DIEGO COUNTY-SAN DIEGO SUPERIOR COURT, CENTRAL DIVISION, CASE NO. SC154926 FOR THE PURPOSE OF
SCHEDULING OEX IN SAN FRANCISCO SMALL CLAIMS COURT JUDGEMENT ENTERED ON 9/28/04.
